internal_issues.description: Part 2b 'These four are' contradiction: {{CA_DOME}}=2 but text listed 4 WINs. FIXED by self-apply.
WIN-020 called 'empirically confirmed derivation' but derives_from_dome=false. FIXED.
WIN-044 described as 'pending Aug 2026' but verdict is Self-Contradicted. FIXED.
Part 2b hardcoded counts stale (43→47, 19→18, 67→69/{{TOTAL_WINS}}). FIXED (stopgap). ISS-1014 open for template var infrastructure.
WIN-029: area-weighted→linear radial, symmetry defense preempted. FIXED.
Part 2b hardcoded quadruple/triple counts need {{CA_QUAD_FAIL}}/{{CA_TRIPLE_FAIL}} template vars in generate-html.js. OPEN — needs human approval for build script change.
SEC-1.9 FSF-input claim unquoted — needs dome source research. ASSIGNED to analyst.

recommended_actions.action: Human: Add {{CA_QUAD_FAIL}}, {{CA_TRIPLE_FAIL}}, {{CA_LOW_FAIL}} template vars to generate-html.js to replace hardcoded Part 2b counts (ISS-1014). Stopgap 47/18 in place but will drift again on next WIN addition.
Analyst: ISS-1009 — pull FSF definition from dome repo (raw-text/monitor.py or model page) and quote it in SEC-1.9 before Aug 2026 eclipse test.
Curmudgeon: SEC-2b.3 queued for fresh review (queue_id 135). The critical 'These four are' fix is live; curmudgeon should attack the new text.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: We caught ourselves: dome review's own Part 2 had a 4-for-2 math error
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The HOL-COMPLETENESS holistic review found our Part 2b analysis claiming 'only 2 derive from dome geometry — these four are: WIN-020, WIN-044, WIN-057, WIN-058.' After build-time expansion, the contradiction is visible on the page. We self-caught and fixed it: only WIN-044 and WIN-057 actually derive from dome parameters. WIN-020's gear ratios are fitted; WIN-058 is definitional. The correction also updates WIN-044's description from 'pending August 2026 verification' to 'self-contradicted by coordinate collapse.'
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: We criticize the dome for self-contradictions; catching and publicizing our own is high-credibility transparency.

curmudgeon_queue.schedule_notes: No mismatch detected. BAU mode, 4h interval appropriate for 1-item queue.

self_apply_summary.notes: 2 patches applied manually (tldr fields not supported by apply-patches.js). All 3323 tests pass post-apply.
